name: CISO Global, Inc.
business: CISO Global, Inc. is a cybersecurity, compliance, and software firm that provides a comprehensive suite of services including managed security, professional services, and cybersecurity software. The company serves over 437 clients across diverse sectors, leveraging a technology-agnostic approach and proprietary software to enhance threat detection and response.

exposures.sentence: Our company is a leading cybersecurity, compliance, and software firm composed of highly trained and seasoned security professionals.

tamClaims.claim: Cybersecurity Ventures projected global damages from cybercrime will propel global spending on cybersecurity products and services to $1 trillion (USD) annually by 2031.
tamClaims.sentence: Cybersecurity Ventures projected global damages from cybercrime will propel global spending on cybersecurity products and services to $1 trillion (USD) annually by 2031.

tamClaims.claim: Global cybersecurity spending is forecasted to surpass $520 billion annually (USD) by 2026, up from $260 billion in 2021.
tamClaims.sentence: Reflecting this urgency, global cybersecurity spending is forecasted to surpass $520 billion annually (USD) by 2026, up from $260 billion in 2021.

tamClaims.claim: Ransomware is expected to inflict an estimated $265 billion in annual damages by 2031, up from $20 billion in 2021.
tamClaims.sentence: Ransomware remains one of the fastest-growing attack types, with incidents expected to occur every two seconds, inflicting an estimated $265 billion in annual damages by 2031 a dramatic rise from $20 billion and an attack every 11 seconds in 2021.
According to The New York Times and Cybersecurity Ventures, 3.5 million cybersecurity roles remain unfilled a disparity expected to have persisted through 2025.
